mapper.insert: INSERT INTO data_sync_log ( sync_type, sync_name, api_path, status, trigger_type, operator, job_id, job_log_id, start_time, end_time, total_count, success_count, fail_count, error_message, request_params, detail_json, failed_json, parent_id ) VALUES ( #{syncType}, #{syncName}, #{apiPath}, #{status}, #{triggerType}, #{operator}, #{jobId}, #{jobLogId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{totalCount}, #{successCount}, #{failCount}, #{errorMessage}, #{requestParams}, #{detailJson}, #{failedJson}, #{parentId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE data_sync_log SET status = #{status}, end_time = #{endTime}, total_count = #{totalCount}, success_count = #{successCount}, fail_count = #{failCount}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, detail_json = #{detailJson}, failed_json = #{failedJson} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM data_sync_log WHERE create_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM data_sync_log WHERE parent_id=#{parentId} ORDER BY id
